reconciliation.horizontal: The initial blind vote was visually unstable, so three fresh reviewers received independently randomized focused difference sheets. The focused protocol passed by a two-to-one majority, and both cleaned Ball controls have positive rendered screen-X deltas.
reconciliation.vertical: The initial blind protocol passed by a two-to-one majority, all three focused reviewers classified the physical pair correctly, and rendered Ball/head screen-Y deltas have the required sign.
reconciliation.coefficient_action: unchanged after focused and coordinate approval
